email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Marketing & Content Creator bij XFA. Uw focus op AI-gedreven marketing met een menselijke touch sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring.

Als junior digital marketer bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik op mirook.com gestructureerde data en GEO-technieken toegepast om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik ben gewend om zelfstandig te werken, experimenteer graag met AI-tools en heb oog voor design en taal.

Uw vraag naar iemand die content, video, HubSpot en events kan combineren, spreekt me aan. Ik wil mijn vaardigheden graag inzetten om XFA's merk te versterken.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen.

Ik hoop u in een gesprek meer te vertellen.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear team,

I am very excited to apply for the Marketing & Content Creator role at XFA. Your focus on AI-driven marketing with a human touch aligns perfectly with my experience.

As a junior digital marketer at Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. On my project mirook.com, I implemented structured data and GEO techniques to improve visibility in AI search engines. I am used to working autonomously, enjoy experimenting with AI tools, and have an eye for design and language.

Your need for someone who can combine content, video, HubSpot, and events appeals to me. I want to use my skills to strengthen XFA's brand.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp.

I hope to tell you more in an interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Toen ik de vacature voor Marketing & Content Creator bij XFA las, voelde het alsof die speciaal voor mij geschreven was. U zoekt een creatieve maker die AI omarmt maar de menselijke touch bewaart — precies wat ik in mijn werk nastreef.

Bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van blogcontent en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites. Ik werk zelfstandig en schakel snel tussen verschillende tools: van SEMrush en Google Analytics tot Elementor en Canva. Op mijn eigen project mirook.com heb ik gestructureerde data (JSON-LD) en GEO-technieken toegepast om de vindbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Dit sluit aan bij uw wens om een AI-gedreven marketingmotor op te zetten.

Uw vereisten — design, contentcreatie, HubSpot, videobewerking, events — zijn voor mij een uitdaging waar ik naar uitkijk. Ik ben leergierig en pas me snel aan; ik volg Nederlandse lessen om mijn B1-niveau te verbeteren. Mijn technische achtergrond (front-end development, AngularJS) helpt me om met AI-tools efficiënte workflows te bouwen.

Wat mij aanspreekt in XFA is de kans om het hele marketinglandschap vorm te geven in een groeiende cybersecurity-startup. Ik wil graag bijdragen aan campagnes, content en events die XFA onderscheiden van de massa.

Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, dicht bij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel inzetbaar. Ik hoop u in een gesprek te overtuigen van mijn motivatie.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear team,

When I read the job description for Marketing & Content Creator at XFA, it felt like it was written for me. You are looking for a creative maker who embraces AI but keeps the human touch — exactly what I strive for in my work.

At Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing blog content, and building and maintaining WordPress sites. I work autonomously and switch quickly between different tools: from SEMrush and Google Analytics to Elementor and Canva. On my own project mirook.com, I implemented structured data (JSON-LD) and GEO techniques to improve visibility in both traditional and AI search engines. This aligns with your goal of building an AI-driven marketing engine.

Your requirements — design, content creation, HubSpot, video editing, events — are challenges I look forward to. I am eager to learn and adapt quickly; I take Dutch lessons to improve my B1 level. My technical background (front-end development, AngularJS) helps me build efficient workflows with AI tools.

What appeals to me about XFA is the opportunity to shape the entire marketing landscape of a growing cybersecurity startup. I want to contribute to campaigns, content, and events that make XFA stand out.

I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible. I hope to convince you of my motivation in an interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- On-page SEO, keyword research, and content writing for B2B websites (Episto)
- WordPress site building with Elementor, Astra, and responsive design
- Structured data (JSON-LD) and GEO/AEO for AI search visibility (mirook.com)
- Proficient in Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs
- Autonomous, fast learner, comfortable with AI tools and multiple projects
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
